hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Session ended. Remember: run npm run check (lint + format + audit + tests) before pushing to remote."}'
file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$file" ] && npx prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *shared/tokens.css) echo '--- Token Audit (tokens.css changed) ---' && node scripts/audit-tokens.js 2>&1 | tail -35 ;; *.css) node scripts/audit-tokens.js --quick "$file" 2>&1 | tail -12 ;; esac; fi; true

echo '{"systemMessage": "Doodles project loaded. Key conventions: (1) Always delegate to Haiku subagents for file work. (2) No box-shadow — use border-color+transform. (3) No emojis — use Tabler icons. (4) Run npm run check before committing. (5) Age groups: u6/u12/12plus must be set on all new games."}'
